name: The guarded hall
description:
You walk down a small, quiet, torch lit hallway. Doors of different colors are
in each wall. To your east, you see a &Mpink&n door. To your west, you see a
&Wwhite&n door. The hall itself leads north and south.

extra_descriptions.description: You see a black door. It has the name "Darkoth" inscribed on it.
You see a maroon door here. It has the name "Amyrok" written on it.
